name: Emoji Dropper
author: Poki
description: Emoji Dropper is a watermelon game where your favorite emojis take center stage! Drop emoji balls strategically to merge identical ones and create bigger, crazier emojis. From small smiles to angry faces and mischievous grins, all your favorites are here. Plan your drops carefully to keep the board clear and aim for the ultimate mega-emoji! Can you create the biggest emoji of all time? How to play Emoji Dropper? Move your emoji ball with the mouse and click to drop it into the cup! Who created Emoji Dropper? Emoji Dropper is created by pgs1000. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Emoji Dropper for free? You can play Emoji Dropper for free on Poki. Can I play Emoji Dropper on mobile devices and desktop? Emoji Dropper can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
